title: MineGraph
description: MineGraph: Making Minecraft as animated and fresh as possible, while keeping it 100% vanilla.
body:
## 🌟 MineGraph – The Minecraft You've Always Dreamed Of!

Tired of choosing between the classic Minecraft essence and breathtaking graphics? **MineGraph** is the ultimate solution! This modpack was meticulously crafted for players who love the original Minecraft experience but want to elevate it to a new visual and auditory level. Without adding new items, blocks, or mechanics that alter core gameplay, MineGraph transforms your world into something **vibrant, immersive, and incredibly beautiful** – all while remaining 100% true to the vanilla spirit.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MpxF0DfSqLE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> _**Rediscover your favorite world, now richer and more atmospheric than ever.**_

---

### ✨ Why Choose MineGraph?

MineGraph stands out by offering an enhanced vanilla experience, focusing on **optimization and immersion**. Unlike other modpacks that add hundreds of mods and can cause conflicts or slowdowns, MineGraph is **lightweight and focused**, ensuring stability and performance.

#### 🔹 Stunning Visuals

Prepare for a **visual revolution** that redefines the beauty of Minecraft:

*   **Enhanced Textures and Smooth Animations:** Every block and item comes to life with refined details, providing unprecedented visual fidelity. The integration of resource packs like `xali's Enhanced Vanilla` and `FreshAnimations` ensures that every game element, from the environment to creatures, is rendered with **impressive clarity and fluidity**.

*   **Modern Particles and Realistic Lighting Effects:** Witness sunlight filtering through trees, dust particles dancing in the air, and water dynamically reflecting the environment. Mods like `ParticleEffects` and `explosive-enhancement` elevate particle quality, while `Iris Shaders` and `sodiumdynamiclights` work together to create a lighting system that **completely transforms the game's atmosphere**, making every scene a living work of art.

*   **Subtle Details that Transform:** Each biome becomes a unique experience, with visual elements that make it feel truly alive. The addition of `Better-Leaves` and `JS_PlumpPlants` provides denser foliage and more voluminous plants, while `Fresh Flowers and Plants` and `Simple Grass Flowers` enrich the flora, creating **lush and realistic landscapes**. Packs like `Clean_Connected_Glass` and `Better Lanterns` ensure that structures and lighting integrate more naturally and cohesively.

#### 🔹 Immersive Sounds

Hear the world of Minecraft like never before, with a soundscape that **completely envelops you**:

*   **Dynamic Ambient Audio:** Let yourself be enveloped by the sounds of nature, from whispering wind to rustling leaves. `AmbientSounds` and `Enhanced Audio Ambience` create a **rich and responsive sound atmosphere**, adapting to your surroundings and the weather, making every exploration more captivating.

*   **Footstep, Weather, and Biome Audio Improvements:** Every step, every raindrop, and every environment has its own characteristic sound, adding **unparalleled depth** to your adventure. `PresenceFootsteps` offers realistic footstep sounds for every surface type, while `sound-physics-remastered` enhances environmental acoustics, making sounds reverberate and spread more authentically, increasing the sense of immersion.

#### 🔹 Optimized Performance

Play smoothly, even with enhanced graphics, thanks to **robust optimization**:

*   **High FPS:** With the powerful combination of `Sodium`, `Iris Shaders`, `Lithium`, `C2ME`, and `Dynamic FPS`, enjoy **high frame rates** on most PCs. These mods work together to optimize rendering, chunk loading, and resource management, ensuring a fluid and responsive gaming experience.

*   **Fast Loading and Fluid Gameplay:** Less waiting, more exploring. `FerriteCore` and `Krypton` optimize memory usage and networking, respectively, reducing loading times and minimizing lag, allowing you to dive into the adventure **without interruptions**.

#### 🔹 100% Vanilla-Friendly

Keep the essence of Minecraft untouched, just more beautiful:

*   **No New Mechanics, Blocks, or Items:** Your gameplay experience remains unchanged, only visually and audibly enhanced. MineGraph focuses on **improving what already exists**, without introducing elements that might alter the original game's character.

*   **Full Compatibility with Vanilla Servers:** Play with your friends worry-free, on any vanilla server. The non-intrusive nature of the mods ensures that you can enjoy MineGraph in multiplayer environments **without compatibility issues**.

---

<details>
<summary>### 🧩 Highlighted Mods and Resource Packs</summary>

MineGraph is a carefully selected compilation of the best mods and resource packs to ensure the promised experience. Below is a detailed list of the components that make MineGraph shine:

#### Optimization and Performance

*   `Sodium`: High-performance rendering optimization.
*   `Iris Shaders`: Shader support for incredible visuals.
*   `Lithium`: General game performance optimizations.
*   `C2ME`: Chunk loading and world generation optimizations (includes Starlight-like functionalities).
*   `Dynamic FPS`: Reduces GPU usage when the game is inactive.
*   `FerriteCore`: Memory usage optimization.
*   `Krypton`: Network optimization.
*   `ImmediatelyFast`: Additional performance optimizations.
*   `More Culling`: Optimizes entity and block rendering.
*   `Entity Culling`: Optimizes entity rendering.
*   `BadOptimizations`: Collection of minor optimizations.
*   `ThreadTweak`: Optimizes thread usage.
*   `ScalableLux`: Optimizes lighting calculation.

#### Visuals and Graphics

*   `Continuity`: Connected textures for blocks.
*   `LambDynamicLights`: Dynamic lights from items and entities.
*   `BetterEnchantmentGlint`: Enhanced enchantment glint.
*   `Visuality`: Additional visual effects.
*   `Blur`: Blur effect for interfaces.
*   `Entity Model Features`: Enhanced entity models.
*   `Skin Layers 3D`: 3D skin layers for players.
*   `Modelfix`: Fixes for entity models.
*   `ParticleEffects`: Enhanced particle effects.
*   `Explosive Enhancement`: Visual improvements for explosions.
*   `Coolrain`: Enhanced rain effects.
*   `Particular`: Customizable particle effects.
*   `Sodium Dynamic Lights`: Dynamic lights integration with Sodium.

#### Audio and Immersion

*   `AmbientSounds`: Immersive ambient sounds.
*   `PresenceFootsteps`: Realistic footstep sounds.
*   `Sound Physics Remastered`: Enhanced sound acoustics.
*   `Voicechat`: In-game voice chat.
*   `SubtleEffects`: Subtle environmental effects.
*   `Sounds`: General audio improvements.

#### Quality of Life and Interface

*   `Mod Menu`: In-game mod manager.
*   `Zoomify`: Customizable zoom.
*   `CoordHUD`: Displays coordinates on screen.
*   `Better Advancements`: Enhanced advancements interface.
*   `ChatImpressiveAnimation`: Enhanced chat animations.
*   `HMI`: Help for item recipes and uses.
*   `Draggable Lists`: Draggable lists in interfaces.
*   `Global Narration Toggle`: Toggles global narration.
*   `Language Reload`: Reloads languages without restarting the game.
*   `Ping Wheel`: Point marking tool.
*   `SittingPlus`: Allows sitting on blocks.
*   `McInspects`: Block/entity inspection tool.

#### Libraries and Dependencies

*   `Fabric API`: Essential API for Fabric mods.
*   `owo-lib`: Utility library for mods.
*   `Placeholder API`: API for text placeholders.
*   `Yet Another Config Lib (YACL)`: Configuration library.
*   `Architectury API`: API for cross-modloader compatibility.
*   `Collective`: Utility library.
*   `LibJF`: Utility library.
*   `Fabric Language Kotlin`: Kotlin support for mods.
*   `ForgeConfigAPIPort`: Forge config API port for Fabric.
*   `Txnilib`: Utility library.
*   `RSLS`: Rendering library.
*   `CreativeCore`: Library for creative mods.
*   `Ismah`: Utility library.
*   `CrashAssistant`: Helps with crash debugging.

#### Resource Packs (Textures)

*   `Crosshair v4`: Custom crosshair.
*   `Fresh Flowers and Plants`: Fresh flowers and plants.
*   `Light Leak`: Light leak effect.
*   `xali's Enhanced Vanilla`: Enhanced vanilla textures.
*   `FA+All_Extensions`: Extensions for Fresh Animations.
*   `Enhanced Audio Ambience`: Enhanced ambient audio.
*   `AL's 3D Potions`: 3D potions.
*   `Redstone Torch`: Redstone torch texture.
*   `Clean_Connected_Glass`: Clean connected glass.
*   `3D Projectiles`: 3D projectiles.
*   `Cubic Sun Moon`: Cubic sun and moon.
*   `Lively Turtle Helmet`: Animated turtle helmet.
*   `Fresh Music Discs`: Fresh music discs.
*   `Better_Cats`: Enhanced cats.
*   `Tools & Utils`: Tools and utilities.
*   `Actually 3D Stuff`: Various 3D items.
*   `Bees Reimagined`: Reimagined bees.
*   `Trabens 3D Arrows`: 3D arrows.
*   `Elytra Contrails`: Elytra contrails.
*   `Visual Effects+`: Additional visual effects.
*   `Enhanced Audio`: Enhanced audio.
*   `Boss Refreshed`: Updated boss textures.
*   `Sun and Moon Circular`: Circular sun and moon.
*   `Immersive Interfaces`: Immersive interfaces.
*   `Qrafty's Capitalized Font`: Capitalized font.
*   `Better-Leaves`: Enhanced leaves.
*   `Fresh Food`: Fresh food.
*   `Refurbished Log Boat`: Refurbished log boat.
*   `Better Lanterns`: Enhanced lanterns.
*   `Simple Grass Flowers`: Simple grass flowers.
*   `JS_PlumpPlants`: Plumper plants.
*   `Enchanting Table Magic Circle Blue`: Blue magic circle for enchanting table.
*   `RAY's 3D Rails`: 3D rails.
*   `Ben's Bundles`: Item bundles.
*   `Better_Dogs`: Enhanced dogs.
*   `Better Fresher 3D Books`: Enhanced 3D books.
*   `Fishing_Rod_3D`: 3D fishing rod.
*   `Blue's Better Monsters`: Enhanced monsters.
*   `Hoffens Minimal Armor`: Minimalist armor.
*   `Beautiful Totem Of Undying`: Beautiful totem of undying.
*   `FreshAnimations`: Fresh animations.
*   `Blockier Goat Horn`: Blockier goat horn.
*   `Detailed Animations Reworked X Just Expressions`: Reworked detailed animations.

#### Shaders (Shader Packs)

*   `AstraLex`: High-quality shader.
*   `BSL`: Popular shader with beautiful effects.
*   `ComplementaryUnbound`: Shader focused on performance and customization.
*   `Mellow Shader`: Shader with a soft atmosphere.
*   `Miniature Shader`: Lightweight and minimalist shader.
*   `Bloop`: Shader focused on visual effects.
*   `ComplementaryReimagined`: Reimagined version of Complementary Shaders.

</details>

<details>
<summary>### 📜 Credits</summary>

All included mods, shaders, and resource packs belong to their respective authors. This pack simply compiles and configures them to create a cohesive experience. Please support and credit the original creators if you use or share their work separately.

</details>
